title: GOOD: Mutex-protected callback snapshot in RX thread prevents TOCTOU races
description: lora_l2.c lines 167-171: The RX thread snapshots both rx_callback and rx_callback_user_data under the mutex before invoking, and set_rx_callback() updates both atomically. This prevents invoking a callback with mismatched user_data. Worth defending if anyone suggests 'simplifying' by removing the mutex.
